title: transport: parse_incoming doc attached to test module
description:
In core/src/transport.rs, the doc comment block at lines 492-500 that describes parse_incoming is placed immediately before the #[cfg(test)] mod tests block (line 501), not before the parse_incoming function definition (line 606). Rustdoc attaches doc comments to the item that immediately follows them, so this doc block becomes the documentation for the tests module, not for parse_incoming. The parse_incoming function has no doc comment at all.

Fix: move the doc comment to immediately precede the parse_incoming fn at line 606.
